dogs.name: Akari
dogs.story: Akari is looking for a loving home. Contact us to learn more about this sweet soul.

dogs.name: Alma
dogs.story: Alma is such a curious dog! She's a bit shy at first, but that just makes her all the more endearing. She's such a sweet girl who just wants lots of cuddles. She is the most friendly dog you could ever wish to meet! She lives with three other dogs at the shelter, and they all get on perfectly. All she needs is a loving human to shower her with affection every day of her life. Will you be that person?

dogs.name: Amber
dogs.story: Amber is looking for a new home. Right now she lives as a free running dog in the bungalow area of the foundation. Here she has a lot of interactions with humans and other dogs. She is very social and will come running up every time you enter the space. Can you give her a loving home?

dogs.name: Aurora

cats.name: Butter
cats.story: Butter is a beautiful orange-and-white cat who loves to climb high and watch the world from his favorite perches. Independent and confident, he carries himself with a quiet grace that makes him truly special. Yet when you approach him gently, he welcomes soft strokes and shared moments of calm. He has a warm spirit that asks for nothing but offers so much in return. Could your heart be the place where Butter finally feels truly at home?
